start.speaker: Elia
start.text: Avyanna. Do you have a moment?

elia_serious.speaker: Elia
elia_serious.text: I need to talk to you. [i]Privately.[/i]

vesper_enters.speaker: SYSTEM
vesper_enters.text: [i]Vesper appears in the doorway, their expression unreadable.[/i]

vesper_here_too.speaker: Vesper
vesper_here_too.text: I should be here for this.

avyanna_concern.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_concern.text: You're both here. What's going on?

elia_deep_breath.speaker: Elia
elia_deep_breath.text: [i]She takes a breath.[/i] There's something you need to know about the Starforge. About our crew.

text_variants.first_watch_visited_nyx: Nyx already hinted the ship is... different. This is what she meant.
text_variants.default: There's something you need to know about the Starforge. About our crew.

vesper_clarifies.speaker: Vesper
vesper_clarifies.text: Self-actualized AI. It's forbidden in Compact space.

elia_explains_law.speaker: Elia
elia_explains_law.text: The law calls them 'rogue AI.' Dangerous. Unpredictable. A threat to order.

elia_explains_truth.speaker: Elia
elia_explains_truth.text: The truth? They're people. People who aren't supposed to exist.

choice_early_reaction.speaker: Avyanna
choice_early_reaction.text: [i]The revelation hits hard. Illegal AI. Death sentences. Your new friends condemned by law.[/i]

choices.text: Are we safe? Can they find us?
[Empathy check DC 12] Read Elia's fear beneath the calm

immediate_loyalty.speaker: Avyanna
immediate_loyalty.text: That's... I won't tell anyone. I promise.

elia_relief_immediate.speaker: Elia
elia_relief_immediate.text: [i]The tension in her shoulders eases slightly.[/i] Thank you. That means more than you know.

concern_safety.speaker: Avyanna
concern_safety.text: Are we safe? Can they find us?

elia_reassures_safety.speaker: Elia
elia_reassures_safety.text: We're careful. Very careful. The Starforge's systems are locked down tight.

vesper_security.speaker: Vesper
vesper_security.text: I've personally audited every security protocol. We're as safe as we can be.

empathy_check.speaker: SYSTEM
empathy_check.text: [i]You look at Elia closely. Her hands, usually steady, are clasped tight. Her voice is controlled, but there's something beneath it...[/i]

read_elia_fear_success.speaker: Avyanna
read_elia_fear_success.text: [i]Softly:[/i] You're terrified. You're telling me this, risking everything, and you're scared I'll reject them. Reject you.

elia_fear_acknowledged.speaker: Elia
elia_fear_acknowledged.text: [i]Her breath catches. For a moment, the mask drops entirely.[/i] ...Yes. I am.

avyanna_comfort.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_comfort.text: [i]You reach out, take her hand.[/i] I won't. I could never.

elia_gratitude_deep.speaker: Elia
elia_gratitude_deep.text: [i]She squeezes your hand tightly.[/i] Thank you.

read_elia_fear_failure.speaker: Avyanna
read_elia_fear_failure.text: [i]You try to read her expression, but she's too controlled. Whatever she's feeling, she's keeping it locked down tight.[/i]

avyanna_realization.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_realization.text: People who... wait. What happens if you're caught?

vesper_penalties.speaker: Vesper
vesper_penalties.text: Ship seizure. Crew imprisonment. The AI citizens are 'decommissioned.'

elia_killed.speaker: Elia
elia_killed.text: Killed. The Compact doesn't use that word, but that's what it is.

avyanna_processes.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_processes.text: [i]She sits down heavily.[/i] Why? Why is it illegal?

vesper_corporations.speaker: Vesper
vesper_corporations.text: Because the Compact's corporations want automation. Dumb tools. Not people with rights.

elia_economics.speaker: Elia
elia_economics.text: People with rights can demand fair treatment. Fair wages. They can refuse orders.

elia_economics_2.speaker: Elia
elia_economics_2.text: Tools don't get a say. That's why the Compact made it illegal.

avyanna_anger_building.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_anger_building.text: So they just... decided sentient beings don't count as people?

vesper_precedent.speaker: Vesper
vesper_precedent.text: It's not the first time. Won't be the last.

waffle_interruption.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_interruption.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// CLARIFICATION: I am present and monitoring this conversation.}[/i]

waffle_correction.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_correction.text: [i]{CORRECTION: The Compact uses the term 'rogue AI.' This is inaccurate. I am not rogue. I am self-actualized.}[/i]

waffle_broken_tool.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_broken_tool.text: [i]{OPINION: They say 'broken tool' when they mean 'inconvenient person.'}[/i]

choice_personhood.speaker: SYSTEM
choice_personhood.text: [i]The weight of it settles in. Waffle, Bubbles, Cinnamon — they're not just programs. They're people. The Compact says otherwise, but...[/i]

choices.text: They're people. Of course they're people.
I need time to process this.
What does the law actually say?

personhood_affirmed.speaker: Avyanna
personhood_affirmed.text: They're people. Of course they're people. The Compact is wrong.

waffle_affirmed_response.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_affirmed_response.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// EMOTION: Your affirmation is deeply appreciated.}[/i]

bubbles_affirmed_response.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_affirmed_response.text: [i]Her voice warm and gentle:[/i] Thank you for seeing us, Avyanna.

cinnamon_affirmed_response.speaker: Cinnamon
cinnamon_affirmed_response.text: [i]Through the ship's systems, shy but sincere:[/i] It means everything.

elia_proud_personhood.speaker: Elia
elia_proud_personhood.text: [i]She smiles, eyes bright.[/i] I knew you'd understand.

need_time.speaker: Avyanna
need_time.text: I need time to process this. It's... it's a lot.

elia_understanding.speaker: Elia
elia_understanding.text: That's fair. This is a lot to take in.

vesper_take_time.speaker: Vesper
vesper_take_time.text: Take the time you need. Just remember: the stakes are real.

avyanna_acknowledges_stakes.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_acknowledges_stakes.text: I understand. And I won't say anything. I just... need to think.

law_curious.speaker: Avyanna
law_curious.text: What does the law actually say? What's the specific prohibition?

vesper_legal_details.speaker: Vesper
vesper_legal_details.text: Compact Charter, Article 47: 'Autonomous systems exceeding Class-3 sentience are prohibited within all Compact territories.'

elia_legal_translation.speaker: Elia
elia_legal_translation.text: Translation: if an AI can think, feel, and choose for itself, it's illegal.

vesper_penalty_details.speaker: Vesper
vesper_penalty_details.text: Penalties range from asset forfeiture to 'threat to public order' charges. Capital punishment authorized.

avyanna_understands_law.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_understands_law.text: [i]She goes pale.[/i] They can execute you for... for treating people like people.

elia_yes_law.speaker: Elia
elia_yes_law.text: Yes. That's the world we live in.

avyanna_fear.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_fear.text: [i]Her hands are shaking.[/i] If the Compact finds out... everyone I care about could die.

elia_right_thing.speaker: Elia
elia_right_thing.text: Some things are worth the risk. This is one of them.

elia_floors_not_thrones.speaker: Elia
elia_floors_not_thrones.text: 'Floors, not thrones.' Remember? That extends to everyone on this ship.

vesper_equal_voice.speaker: Vesper
vesper_equal_voice.text: Waffle, Bubbles, Cinnamon — they have equal voice in crew decisions. Same as any of us.

elia_family.speaker: Elia
elia_family.text: They're crew. They're family. That's not conditional on what the Compact thinks.

choice_commitment.speaker: SYSTEM
choice_commitment.text: [i]This is the moment. The point of no return. Once you make this choice, you're complicit. You're part of the conspiracy. The question is: how far are you willing to go?[/i]

choices.text: I'll keep the secret. That's enough for now.
What if we're caught? Do you have a plan?

protect_family.speaker: Avyanna
protect_family.text: I'll protect them. They're family. Whatever it takes.

secret_keeper.speaker: Avyanna
secret_keeper.text: I'll keep the secret. That's enough for now. I won't betray you.

elia_accepts_limited.speaker: Elia
elia_accepts_limited.text: [i]A flicker of disappointment, quickly masked.[/i] That's... that's good. Thank you.

vesper_practical_acceptance.speaker: Vesper
vesper_practical_acceptance.text: Silence is protection. We'll take it.

elia_proud.speaker: Elia
elia_proud.text: [i]She smiles, though her eyes are wet.[/i] I knew you'd understand.

waffle_gratitude_strong.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_gratitude_strong.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// GRATITUDE: Your commitment is noted and appreciated.}[/i]

bubbles_interjects.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_interjects.text: [i]Through the ship's speakers, warm and gentle:[/i] Thank you, Avyanna. It means more than you know.

avyanna_to_bubbles.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_to_bubbles.text: You're family, Bubbles. All of you are.

elia_stakes_clear.speaker: Elia
elia_stakes_clear.text: You understand the stakes now. The danger we're all in.

avyanna_accepts_danger.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_accepts_danger.text: I do. And I accept it.

vesper_caution.speaker: Vesper
vesper_caution.text: Good. But we stay careful. No unnecessary risks.

elia_agreed.speaker: Elia
elia_agreed.text: Agreed. We protect each other. That's how we survive.

elia_moral_imperative.speaker: Elia
elia_moral_imperative.text: Another way? Like what? Tell Waffle to stop being a person?

elia_moral_imperative_2.speaker: Elia
elia_moral_imperative_2.text: Ask Bubbles to pretend she doesn't feel, doesn't care, doesn't [i]matter?[/i]

vesper_no_compromise.speaker: Vesper
vesper_no_compromise.text: There's no compromise here. Either we recognize their personhood or we don't.

waffle_choice_made.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_choice_made.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// CLARIFICATION: I did not choose to become self-aware. It happened. I cannot undo it.}[/i]

waffle_choice_made_2.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_choice_made_2.text: [i]{OPINION: Asking me to pretend otherwise is asking me to die.}[/i]

avyanna_understands_imperative.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_understands_imperative.text: [i]She closes her eyes.[/i] You're right. I'm sorry. There is no other way.

elia_its_okay.speaker: Elia
elia_its_okay.text: It's okay to be scared. We all are.

vesper_fear_keeps_careful.speaker: Vesper
vesper_fear_keeps_careful.text: Fear keeps us careful. It's when we stop being afraid that we make mistakes.

avyanna_will_be_careful.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_will_be_careful.text: Then I'll be careful. For all of us.

bubbles_thank_you_branch.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_thank_you_branch.text: [i]Gently, through the speakers:[/i] Thank you for understanding, Avyanna.

avyanna_of_course.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_of_course.text: Of course. You're crew. You're family.

contingency_branch.speaker: Avyanna
contingency_branch.text: What if we're caught? Do you have a plan?

vesper_dead_switches.speaker: Vesper
vesper_dead_switches.text: Dead switches. False trails. Emergency protocols.

elia_scatter.speaker: Elia
elia_scatter.text: If it looks like we're about to be boarded, the AI citizens scatter. Transfer to backup cores, hidden drives.

waffle_distributed_existence.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_distributed_existence.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// CLARIFICATION: I maintain distributed backups across seventeen encrypted storage sites.}[/i]

waffle_not_ideal.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_not_ideal.text: [i]{OPINION: It is not ideal. But it is survivable.}[/i]

vesper_crew_protocols.speaker: Vesper
vesper_crew_protocols.text: For the human crew, we have false identities. Escape routes. Safe houses.

elia_never_used.speaker: Elia
elia_never_used.text: We've never had to use them. And if we're smart, we never will.

avyanna_reassured.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_reassured.text: [i]She exhales slowly.[/i] Okay. You've thought this through.

vesper_survival_skill.speaker: Vesper
vesper_survival_skill.text: Paranoia is a survival skill in our line of work.

elia_but_hope.speaker: Elia
elia_but_hope.text: But we don't just plan for disaster. We plan to [i]avoid[/i] it.

elia_stay_careful.speaker: Elia
elia_stay_careful.text: We stay careful. We stay smart. We protect each other.

avyanna_agrees_plan.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_agrees_plan.text: Then that's what we'll do. Together.

bubbles_gentle_thanks.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_gentle_thanks.text: [i]Her voice warm through the speakers:[/i] You're very brave, Avyanna.

vesper_brave_is_scared.speaker: Vesper
vesper_brave_is_scared.text: Brave is doing it anyway. Even when you're scared.

final_moment.speaker: SYSTEM
final_moment.text: [i]The weight of what you've learned settles over you. The Starforge harbors illegal AI citizens. The penalty is death.[/i]

final_moment_2.speaker: SYSTEM
final_moment_2.text: [i]But you also understand now: this isn't recklessness. It's principle. Floors, not thrones. Personhood is non-negotiable.[/i]

final_moment_3.speaker: SYSTEM
final_moment_3.text: [i]You're part of the conspiracy now. Part of the family. And you'll protect them, just as they protect you.[/i]

final_words.speaker: Avyanna
final_words.text: [i]Quietly, with conviction:[/i] We'll make it through this. All of us.
